UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Anne T.H. Wong; Clerk L. Fong; Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances on WED-JUL-13-2016:
Plaintiff Reyna M. Martinez Matta appears in propria persona and is assisted by Spanish interpreter Nina Safdie;
Defendant Gladys Ortiz (sued as Gladis Ortiz) is present and assisted by Spanish interpreter Maritza Ayerdi;
Attorney Erin Katayama appears for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants, and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed. The trial date of July 18, 2016 is vacated. (501/JPT)
